questionHtml: Using your answer to part (b)(i), identify the year disinflation set in.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for identifying 2019 as the year disinflation sets in (“after 2018” or “between 2018 and 2019” are also valid answers).

OFR applies.

breadcrumbLabels: 3.3.3 Low and stable rate of inflation
